tests.title: Fetch claims with Bearer authentication
tests.given: A reachable userinfo_endpoint and a valid access token
tests.when: Fetch is invoked with the access token
tests.then: The request carries an Authorization: Bearer header and the typed standard §5.1 claims are returned

tests.title: Subject consistency match passes
tests.given: An expected subject equal to the UserInfo sub
tests.when: Fetch is invoked with subject validation enabled
tests.then: The response is returned without error

tests.title: Subject consistency mismatch errors
tests.given: An expected subject different from the UserInfo sub
tests.when: Fetch is invoked with subject validation enabled

tests.title: Handle 401 with WWW-Authenticate challenge
tests.given: A userinfo_endpoint that returns HTTP 401 with a WWW-Authenticate header
tests.then: A typed error carrying the status and the WWW-Authenticate challenge is raised

tests.title: Handle 403 error response
tests.then: A typed error carrying the 403 status is raised

tests.title: Handle 5xx / non-JSON response
tests.given: A userinfo_endpoint that returns HTTP 500 with a non-JSON body
tests.then: A descriptive request error carrying the status is raised

tests.title: Preserve custom claims
tests.given: A UserInfo response containing standard and non-standard claims
tests.then: Custom claims are accessible via the response claim map and standard claims remain typed

tests.title: Apply functional options
tests.given: A custom HTTP client and request timeout supplied via options
tests.then: The supplied client is used for the request and the timeout bounds a slow endpoint
